title: Add live MarkUS client data layer
description: Add live-mode configuration from data-review-id, data-api-base-url, and data-public-key. Implement scoped API operations, realtime subscription wiring, offline draft queue states, and tests with mocked backend responses while preserving local-only behavior when live config is absent.

affected_files.reason: live-mode configuration, API client, realtime wiring, and offline queue behavior
local/live mode behavior coverage with mocked API responses

agent_notes.author: agent
agent_notes.content: Live mode is opt-in only when reviewId, apiBaseUrl, and publicKey are configured. The browser client keeps local-only behavior unchanged, uses optimistic local drafts for writes, labels failed writes as Offline draft, and exposes EventSource wiring for future backend realtime events.

summary: Added opt-in live mode configuration, scoped public API requests, live comment loading, optimistic create syncing, offline draft persistence and labeling, EventSource realtime wiring, and mocked browser tests for live load/create/offline behavior while preserving local-only mode.
